exercises.code:
buf = ["a", "b", "END"]
i = 0
out = []
while True:
    if i > 10:
        raise RuntimeError("guard")
    item = buf[i]
    i += 1
    if item == "END":
        break
    out.append(item)
print(out)

exercises.code:
def tasa_reject(sts):
    n_total = len(sts)
    if n_total == 0:
        return None
    n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
    return n_reject / n_total
print(tasa_reject(["accept", "reject", "accept"]))
print(tasa_reject([]))

exercises.code:
sts = ["accept", "accept", "reject", "review", "accept"]
n_total = len(sts)
n_accept = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "accept")
n_reject = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "reject")
n_review = sum(1 for s in sts if s == "review")
print({"n_total": n_total, "n_accept": n_accept, "n_reject": n_reject, "n_review": n_review,
       "tasa_reject": n_reject / n_total if n_total else None})

exercises.code:
def batch_report(rows):
    n_total = len(rows)
    n_reject = sum(1 for r in rows if r.get("status") == "reject")
    return {
        "n_total": n_total,
        "n_reject": n_reject,
        "tasa_reject": (n_reject / n_total) if n_total else None,
        "ids": [r["id"] for r in rows],
    }
print(batch_report([{"id": "A", "status": "accept"}, {"id": "B", "status": "reject"}]))
print(batch_report([]))
exercises.justification_from_packet: [S04-T4-B-E3] reporte reutilizable; vacio -> None. Completé el ejercicio con patrones del theory/iDo/hints del paquete activo de la sección, sin ejecutar código externo ni copiar intentos previos.

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: list(range(3)) produce [0,1,2]: range empieza en 0 y excluye el tope.
zip sin strict recorta al mas corto: empareja (1,10)(2,20) y el 3 se pierde en silencio.
Tasa de reject usa n_total de registros procesados como denominador del gate.
continue salta al siguiente ciclo del for sin terminar el programa.
Doble for anidado sobre n elementos es O(n^2) aproximadamente.
